_format: PH mobile numbers are 10 digits total. Domestic: 0XXXXXXXXXX (11 digits including leading 0). International: +63XXXXXXXXXX. Four-digit prefix determines carrier.
_notes: Prefixes are sometimes shared or re-allocated. Mobile Number Portability (MNP) means real-world numbers may not match their original prefix's carrier. For synthetic generation this doesn't matter.

Globe.description: Globe Telecom / Touch Mobile (TM) / GOMO / ABS-CBN Mobile / Cherry Prepaid are all Globe-operated brands

Smart.description: Smart Communications / Talk N Text (TNT) / Sun Cellular / PLDT / Red Mobile are all Smart-operated brands

Sun.description: Sun Cellular (legacy; merged into Smart since 2016)
